page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg9ae.48xlarge is a bare-metal style instance built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring an x86_64 architecture. The server is equipped with an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor operating at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. It delivers 192 physical cores and 192 vCPUs, indicating a non-hyperthreaded configuration with exactly 1.0 thread per core. The CPU allocation is fully dedicated, ensuring no resource contention. It is configured with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include any local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated physical core allocation and high resource density offer significant value for workloads requiring predictable, non-shared compute resources, though the lack of bundled local storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff for storage-heavy or accelerated computing tasks.

Given its massive dedicated core count and balanced memory-to-core ratio, the ecs.ebmg9ae.48xlarge is suited for large-scale general-purpose workloads, high-performance computing tasks that do not require GPU acceleration, enterprise application hosting, and distributed containerized environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg9ae.48xlarge is a dedicated, KVM-virtualized instance featuring 192 physical cores and 192 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz. With an x86_64 architecture and a non-hyperthreaded design, it provides fully dedicated CPU resources. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It features a 100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. This hardware profile makes the instance highly efficient for large-scale enterprise applications, high-performance computing, and container orchestration platforms requiring predictable, high-density compute power without resource sharing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg9ae.48xlarge is a dedicated instance featuring 192 AMD EPYC cores, 768 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-density enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg9ae.48xlarge features 192 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 768 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density, non-hyperthreaded dedicated compute platform featuring AMD EPYC processors and high-throughput networking for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated physical AMD EPYC 9T95 cores with no hyperthreading.
768.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfers.
Zero local storage and no GPU accelerators bundled.
Suited for high-performance computing, enterprise applications, and container orchestration.
